hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && RUFF=".venv/bin/ruff"; [ ! -x "$RUFF" ] && RUFF=ruff; echo "pre-commit gate: checking lint..." && "$RUFF" check src/ tests/ && echo "pre-commit gate: checking format..." && "$RUFF" format --check src/ tests/ && echo "pre-commit gate: running tests..." && .venv/bin/python -m pytest --tb=short -q || { echo "BLOCKED: lint, format, or tests failed. Fix before committing."; exit 1; }'

bash -c 'cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && RUFF=".venv/bin/ruff"; [ ! -x "$RUFF" ] && RUFF=ruff; echo "pre-push gate: checking lint..." && "$RUFF" check src/ tests/ && echo "pre-push gate: checking format..." && "$RUFF" format --check src/ tests/ && echo "pre-push gate: syncing with remote..." && git pull --rebase --autostash || { echo "BLOCKED: lint, format, or rebase failed. Fix before pushing."; exit 1; }'
